title: Specklinia campestris
taxonomy: Specklinia campestris is a species of orchid in the genus Specklinia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The classification of Specklinia campestris is further divided into the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cranichideae. This classification helps in identifying the plant's unique characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other orchid species. The precise classification of Specklinia campestris is essential for botanists and researchers studying the plant's behavior and growth patterns.
